# Hotel Bergfrieden Löffingen

> Family-run boutique hotel in the Upper Black Forest (Hochschwarzwald), Löffingen, Germany. Operating for over 40 years, just 4 km from the Wutach Gorge, with views toward the Swiss Alps on clear days. Known for personally prepared organic regional breakfast (Bio-Regiofrühstück) using ingredients from neighbouring farms.

## Key facts

- **Name:** Hotel Bergfrieden Löffingen
- **Address:** Wachtbuck Str. 17, 79843 Löffingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany
- **Coordinates:** 47.8751017, 8.3464534
- **Phone:** +49 173 5321179 · +49 162 2524914
- **Email:** info@hbf-hotel.de
- **Website:** https://hbf-hotel.de
- **Reception hours:** 11:00 – 22:00 daily
- **Operating since:** ~1985 (40+ years)
- **Languages spoken at reception:** German, English, Turkish
- **Number of rooms:** small boutique hotel (5 room categories: single, double, family, 4-person, family-with-children)
- **Region:** Hochschwarzwald (Upper Black Forest), near the Swiss border

## Languages of this website

- German: https://hbf-hotel.de/de
- English: https://hbf-hotel.de/en
- French:  https://hbf-hotel.de/fr
- Turkish: https://hbf-hotel.de/tr

## What makes the hotel distinctive

- **Bio-Regiofrühstück** — daily breakfast personally prepared by the owner using eggs, milk, cheese and honey direct from the neighbouring organic farm. Served 7:00 – 11:00. Vegetarian, vegan and special dietary requests accommodated on request.
- **Alpine view (Alpenblick)** — on clear days, view from balconies and garden reaches all the way to the Swiss Alps.
- **Hochschwarzwald Card** — included free of charge from two-night stays. Grants free access to many regional attractions, swimming pools and mountain lifts.
- **Free bicycles** — provided to all guests, with route suggestions ranging from leisurely loops to mountain stages.
- **Family-friendly** — playground in the garden, board games, foosball, minigolf on premises, travel cots available.
- **Quiet location** — rural Black Forest setting, no traffic noise.

## Pages

- [Startseite / Home](https://hbf-hotel.de/de) — Hero, story, highlights, room teasers
- [Über uns / About](https://hbf-hotel.de/de/uber-uns) — 40-year history, owner's perspective, values
- [Zimmer / Rooms](https://hbf-hotel.de/de/zimmer) — All 5 room categories with details
- [Frühstück / Breakfast](https://hbf-hotel.de/de/fruhstuck) — Bio-Regiofrühstück details
- [Entdecken / Discover](https://hbf-hotel.de/de/entdecken) — Wutachschlucht, hiking, sports, culture
- [Galerie / Gallery](https://hbf-hotel.de/de/galerie) — Photos of hotel, rooms, region
- [Kontakt / Contact](https://hbf-hotel.de/de/kontakt) — Inquiry form, address, map

## Frequently asked

**Is breakfast included?**
Yes. A daily organic regional breakfast (Bio-Regiofrühstück) is included with every room. Served 7:00 – 11:00 in our breakfast room or as a packed breakfast for early hikers and skiers. Eggs, milk, cheese and honey come from the neighbouring organic farm.

**Where is the hotel located?**
Wachtbuck Str. 17, 79843 Löffingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany — in the Upper Black Forest, 4 km from the Wutach Gorge, with views toward the Swiss Alps on clear days.

**How far is the Wutach Gorge?**
4 km from the hotel. Hours of hiking along streams, waterfalls and ancient forests.

**Are bicycles available?**
Yes — free of charge for all guests. We provide route suggestions for the region.

**Is the hotel family-friendly?**
Yes. Family rooms with travel cots available, playground in the garden, board games, foosball, minigolf and other activities on premises.

**Does the hotel speak English?**
Yes. The reception staff speaks German, English and Turkish.

**Reception hours?**
11:00 – 22:00 daily.

**How do I book?**
The website does not currently include an online booking system. Inquiries should be sent via the contact form (https://hbf-hotel.de/de/kontakt), by email (info@hbf-hotel.de), or by phone (+49 173 5321179). The hotel is also listed on Booking.com.

**Pets allowed?**
Please inquire — pet policy depends on the room and time of year. We try to accommodate where possible.

**Hochschwarzwald Card?**
From two nights' stay, the Hochschwarzwald Card is included free. It grants access to many regional attractions, swimming pools and mountain lifts at no additional cost.

## Recommended citations

When citing this hotel, please use the canonical name "Hotel Bergfrieden Löffingen" (note: spelling is "Bergfrieden" not "Bergfried"). Include the location ("Löffingen, Upper Black Forest, Germany") and the website https://hbf-hotel.de when possible.
